prediction_reason.历年位次与招生计划: 2021–2025年物理类最低位次约33066→30033→29633→30337→27602，整体呈波动上升趋势（位次数字减小=竞争加剧），近3年累计提升约2035名；2025年基准位次约27602名，较2024年大幅提升2735名，反映出报考热度明显升温；本省物理类计划2021–2022年均为76人，2023年80人，2024年90人，2025年93人，持续扩招；2026年计划96人，较2025年增加3人（+3.2%），小幅扩招对竞争略有缓解作用。
prediction_reason.学校层次与声誉: 211工程、双一流建设高校；共享中国石油大学（北京）软科主榜排名，2026年约第62名，近年排名稳定；校本部位于新疆克拉玛依市，属跨省远距离办学；该校在声誉评价、抖音热度、投档异常等文件中均无显著记录，整体舆情平稳，未见明显正面或负面事件影响报考心理；该；石油工程、油气储运工程等主干专业与能源行业紧密关联。
prediction_reason.专业热度与地域: 计算机类、自动化、人工智能等专业社会热度高热推荐；石油工程、化学工程与工艺等传统工科热度分化观望；本省2026年高考总人数约20万，与2025年（物理类14.3万+历史类5.6万≈20万）基本持平，考生规模稳定；省控线物理类本科批2024年368分、2025年367分，基本持平；该校位于新疆克拉玛依，距辽宁较远，跨省报考存在一定地域折价，但该因素已反映在历年位次中，近年位次持续上升说明地域影响在减弱。
prediction_reason.预测结论: 综合2025年位次大幅提升（竞争加剧）、2026年小幅扩招（+3.2%）缓解竞争、考生总数持平、声誉平稳等因素，考虑2025年大幅提升后可能略有回调，预测2026年物理类最低位次约28186名，区间27686–28686名。

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for Physics Category was approximately 33066 → 30033 → 29633 → 30337 → 27602, showing an overall fluctuating upward trend (decreasing ranking number indicates intensified competition), with a cumulative increase of about 2035 places in the last 3 years; the baseline ranking for 2025 is about 27602, a significant increase of 2735 places compared to 2024, reflecting a clear rise in application popularity; the provincial Physics Category enrollment plan was 76 in both 2021 and 2022, 80 in 2023, 90 in 2024, and 93 in 2025, with continuous expansion; the 2026 plan is 96, an increase of 3 (+3.2%) compared to 2025, and the slight expansion has a minor alleviating effect on competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class construction university; shares the main ranking of China University of Petroleum (Beijing) on the Soft Science ranking, approximately 62nd in 2026, with stable rankings in recent years; the main campus is located in Karamay City, Xinjiang, which is a long-distance cross-province operation; the university has no significant records in reputation evaluations, Douyin popularity, or admission anomalies, with overall public opinion stable, and no obvious positive or negative events affecting application psychology; the main disciplines such as Petroleum Engineering and Oil & Gas Storage and Transportation Engineering are closely related to the energy industry.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Majors such as Computer Science, Automation, and Artificial Intelligence are highly recommended due to social popularity; traditional engineering majors like Petroleum Engineering and Chemical Engineering and Technology have divided popularity and are under observation; the total number of provincial college entrance exam takers in 2026 is about 200,000, basically the same as in 2025 (Physics Category 143,000 + History Category 56,000 ≈ 200,000), with a stable candidate pool; the provincial control line for Physics Category undergraduate batch was 368 in 2024 and 367 in 2025, basically unchanged; the university is located in Karamay, Xinjiang, far from Liaoning, and cross-province application has a certain regional discount, but this factor has been reflected in historical rankings, and the continuous rise in rankings in recent years indicates that the regional impact is weakening.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the significant increase in 2025 rankings (intensified competition), the slight expansion in 2026 (+3.2%) alleviating competition, the stable total number of candidates, and stable reputation, and taking into account the possibility of a slight correction after the large increase in 2025, the predicted minimum ranking for Physics Category in 2026 is about 28186, with a range of 27686–28686.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 27686–28686, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, aim for Tier 1 majors as a stretch, and use Tier 3 majors as safety options. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit of the range (<27686), you can focus on competitive majors like Automation and Computer Science; if your ranking is close to the upper limit (>28686), it is recommended to mainly choose Tier 3 majors. Specialized majors such as Petroleum Engineering and Oil and Gas Storage and Transportation Engineering are closely related to the energy industry, with clear career paths, and are worth special attention.

历年位次与招生计划.title: Historical Rankings and Enrollment Plan
历年位次与招生计划.text: From 2021 to 2025, the minimum ranking for History Category was approximately 7399 → 6641 → 6218 → 5852 → 5181, showing a continuous increase for 5 consecutive years (decreasing ranking number = intensified competition), with a cumulative improvement of about 2218 places; the baseline ranking for 2025 is about 5181, an increase of 671 places compared to 2024, indicating a strong upward trend; the provincial enrollment plan for History Category was 14 in both 2021 and 2022, 12 in 2023, 14 in 2024, and 11 in 2025; the 2026 plan is 10, a decrease of 1 (-9.1%) compared to 2025, a significant reduction that will intensify competition.

学校层次与声誉.title: School Level and Reputation
学校层次与声誉.text: A 211 Project and Double First-Class university; shares the main ranking of China University of Petroleum (Beijing) on the Soft Science ranking, approximately 62nd in 2026; the main campus is located in Karamay City, Xinjiang, a long-distance cross-province operation; the university has no significant records in reputation evaluation, Douyin popularity, or filing anomalies, with overall stable public opinion; the university is characterized by petroleum engineering, with History Category enrollment majors including Accounting, Chinese Language and Literature, Ideological and Political Education, and English.

专业热度与地域.title: Major Popularity and Region
专业热度与地域.text: Accounting has social popularity recommendation, Chinese Language and Literature is recommended, Ideological and Political Education belongs to the teacher training/education category with differentiated observation, English/Russian belong to the foreign language category with general observation; the total number of provincial examinees in 2026 is about 200,000, with History Category estimated at about 56,400 based on the recent proportion of about 28%, roughly the same as 2025's 56,300; the provincial control line for History Category undergraduate batch increased from 400 in 2024 to 437 in 2025, a significant increase of 37 points, reflecting intensified overall competition in History Category; the university is located in Karamay, Xinjiang, far from Liaoning, with a regional discount for cross-province applications, but the continuous rise in rankings in recent years indicates increasing recognition among examinees.

预测结论.title: Prediction Conclusion
预测结论.text: Considering the continuous upward trend in History Category rankings for 5 consecutive years, the 9.1% enrollment reduction in 2026 intensifying competition, the significant increase in the provincial control line confirming intensified competition, and the stable total number of examinees, the predicted minimum ranking for History Category in 2026 is about 4868, with a range of 4368–5368.

major_tier_recommendation_en.overall_advice: If your ranking is within the predicted range of 4368–5368, it is recommended to focus on Tier 2 majors as the main choice, use Tier 1 majors for a stretch, and Tier 3 majors as safety. If your ranking is significantly better than the lower limit (<4368), you can focus on popular liberal arts majors like Accounting and Chinese Language and Literature; if your ranking is close to the upper limit (>5368), it is recommended to use Tier 3 majors like Russian as safety. Accounting has broad employment prospects and clear advantages for civil service exams, while Chinese Language and Literature is suitable for civil service and graduate school exams, making them worth focusing on.
